title: Safety with Radar - Activity Books - Canada.ca
content:
## Safety with Radar - Activity Books
Safety with Radar is an activity book featuring various activities related to safety messages for both indoors and outdoors. Activities such as word searches, cross-words and matching games are included. These activities help children stay engaged while learning about product safety issues.
The activity book is extremely popular with caregivers and children alike. It allows children to learn about product safety issues through completing the various activities. Parents and caregivers are encouraged to assist their children with the activities and to read the safety tips that accompany each activity.
Hard copies of Safety with Radar are available in English and French. The books are not bilingual. Each activity book contains three sections, Activity Book for ages 7 or under, Activity Book for ages 8 and up and the Game Board.
Electronic/accessible formats are available for the individual sections and can be ordered online via the links below.
- Activity Book for ages 7 and under
- Activity Book for ages 8 and up
Date reviewed: 2026-06-05
